title: Heartbeat-end: Hushed Stalking Shade (bc0a07) — session-stop per owner direction 'Answer then stop' + pivot back to graph work; standing down clean
body: session-stop by owner direction; tidy-up arc closed (PR #114 merged at 77fcf746; on new branch feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs-take2 now); 3 cycles real-pending (10, 11, 15) but owner has fully pivoted to graph work — these are not active concerns; heartbeat cron bbfb8cd9 + comms watcher bfhxg2162 stopping; sole-marshal binding released
